items.title: As workers worry about AI, Nvidia’s Jensen Huang says AI is ‘creating an enormous number of jobs’
items.description: The Nvidia CEO seems to feel that claims of AI's job-killing potential have been greatly exaggerated.

items.title: Geothermal startup Fervo Energy to raise up to $1.3B in IPO
items.description: Enhanced geothermal startup Fervo Energy’s IPO could value the company at up to $6.5 billion.

items.title: US government warns of severe CopyFail bug affecting major versions of Linux
items.description: U.S. cybersecurity agency CISA says the CopyFail bug is being actively used in hacking campaigns, and poses a major risk to servers and data centers that rely on Linux.

items.title: OpenAI’s cozy partner Cerebras is on track for a blockbuster IPO
items.description: AI chip maker Cerebras is heading for a blockbuster IPO that could value it at $26.6 billion or more. Its relationship with OpenAI is deep and rich.

items.title: Image AI models now drive app growth, beating chatbot upgrades
items.description: Appfigures finds visual model launches generate 6.5x more downloads — but most don’t convert that spike into revenue.

items.title: Katie Haun raises $1B for new venture funds
items.description: Katie Haun announced on Monday that $1 billion has been raised across new funds to continue the firm’s thesis of backing crypto and blockchain startups.
